title: Fix Admin Authorization & Full Bidirectional Data Sync (Admin ↔ User Panel)

requirements.summary: Fix Admin Dashboard to use admin-authenticated actor for all data queries
acceptanceCriteria: Admin Tournaments section loads and displays all tournaments
Admin Registrations section loads and displays all tournament registrations
Admin Players section loads and displays all registered players
Admin Payment Proofs section loads and displays all submitted payment proofs
Admin Withdrawals section loads and displays all withdrawal requests
Admin Support Tickets section loads and displays all support tickets from all users

file_operations.description: Update all data-fetching query hooks to use the admin-authenticated actor instead of user actor. Replace useQueries hooks that fetch tournaments, registrations, players, payment proofs, withdrawals, and support tickets to call the correct admin-level backend queries (getAllTournaments, getAllPlayers, getAllSupportTicketsSorted, getAllPaymentProofs, getAllWithdrawalRequests, getRegistrationsForTournament). Ensure all sections render the full platform-wide data, not per-user filtered data.

Review and update query hooks used by the admin panel to ensure they call the correct admin backend methods (getAllTournaments, getAllPlayers, getAllSupportTicketsSorted, getAllPaymentProofs, getAllWithdrawalRequests). Ensure these hooks accept and use the admin actor instance instead of a user actor. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing to ensure proper actor passing.

requirements.summary: Add Room ID, Room Password, and YouTube URL fields to admin tournament management UI
acceptanceCriteria: Tournament create/edit form in admin panel has Room ID, Room Password, and YouTube URL fields
Saving these fields persists them to the backend
Existing tournament edit view shows current values of Room ID, Room Password, and YouTube URL

file_operations.description: Update the tournament create/edit form UI to include input fields for Room ID (roomId), Room Password (roomPassword), and YouTube URL (youtubeUrl). When admin creates a tournament, call the backend createTournament with the youtubeUrl parameter. When admin edits an existing tournament, call the backend updateTournamentRoomDetails (for roomId and roomPassword) and updateTournamentYouTubeUrl (for youtubeUrl) mutations. Display the current Room ID, Room Password, and YouTube URL values in the tournament detail/edit view. Use the authorization component to ensure only admins can access these fields.

Add or update mutation hooks for updateTournamentRoomDetails and updateTournamentYouTubeUrl to support admin setting/updating these fields. Ensure the createTournament mutation accepts the youtubeUrl parameter. Verify the authorization component's usage instructions before implementing to ensure proper admin-only access.

requirements.summary: Display Room ID, Room Password, and YouTube URL in Player Dashboard tournaments section
acceptanceCriteria: Player's registered tournaments show Room ID and Room Password when set by admin
YouTube URL appears as a clickable link/button in the tournament card for users
If Room ID/Password or YouTube URL is not set, the field is gracefully hidden or shows a placeholder

file_operations.description: Update the Tournaments section in the player dashboard to display Room ID (roomId), Room Password (roomPassword), and YouTube URL (youtubeUrl) for each tournament the player has registered for. Render the YouTube URL as a clickable link/button that opens in a new tab. If these fields are null or empty, hide them gracefully or show a placeholder message (e.g., 'Room details not yet available'). Use the backend interface Tournament type which includes roomId, roomPassword, and youtubeUrl as optional fields.
